texts.orig: ▪     Infants under 3 years sharing with adult/s – No Charge.
texts.text: ▪     Infants under 3 years sharing with adult/s – No Charge.

texts.text: ▪     3 years up to 11 years sharing with parents pay 50%.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: ▪     12 – 15 years sharing with 1 or 2 adults. Each child pays 75% of applicable per person adult rate.
texts.text: ▪     12 – 15 years sharing with 1 or 2 adults. Each child pays 75% of applicable per person adult rate.
